markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GTM campaign performance and strategize a new evergreen community campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Community Growth:** GrowthX's new community has grown from 70 to 140 paying members ($30/mo) in days, validating the model.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [**New Campaign Strategy:** An evergreen campaign will drive leads to the community, using a free month trial to convert prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [**Automation Overhaul:** A new Clay automation will replace the current SIFT setup, enabling advanced lead segmentation (e.g., by source) for personalized messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
  - [**Partnership:** Understory will create content for GrowthX's community, showcasing SEO/GEO results and offering tactical GTM engineering insights.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

## Topics

### GTM Campaign Performance

  - [**LinkedIn (HeyReach):** Performance exceeds client averages.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [**Connections Sent:** 758](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [**Messages Sent:** 139](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [**Replies:** 30](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [**Acceptance Rate:** \~20%](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [**Reply Rate:** \>20%](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [**Email (Instantly):** Launched Oct 31; 63 opportunities generated.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [High deliverability (not landing in spam).](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [Strategy → Double down on the highest-performing copy.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### New Evergreen Community Campaign

  - [**Goal:** Create a scalable, "always-on" campaign to drive leads to the new community.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [**Offer:** A free month of community access via promo code.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Directly converts leads instead of just offering a recording.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Lead Sources:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Pavilion, Exit 5, Profound, AirOps member/registrant lists](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Competitor LinkedIn followers](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Lists can be reused every \~2 months.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [**Initial Test:** Offer the free month to the 60+ people who replied to the current Lovable webinar campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason will instruct Hesus to update the reply sequence.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)

### New Lead Automation Architecture

  - [**Problem:** The current SIFT setup is clunky and lacks advanced segmentation.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
  - [**Solution:** Mark will build a new Clay automation to create a more sophisticated lead-processing engine.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
    1.  [**Ingest:** Webhooks from SIFT (post reactions, comments, profile views, new followers).](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
    2.  [**Process:** Deduplicate against a suppression list (clients, competitors).](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
    3.  [**Validate:** Extract country and industry to confirm ICP fit.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
    4.  [**Enrich:** Find contact info and emails.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
    5.  [**Segment:** Label leads by source (e.g., GrowthX content vs. competitor content).](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
    6.  [**Route:** Push to HeyReach (LinkedIn) or Instantly (email) with personalized copy.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2150.0)
  - [**Strategic Routing:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
      - [**HeyReach (LinkedIn):** Higher response rates; reserved for high-intent leads (e.g., AirOps registrants).](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2602.0)
      - [**Instantly (Email):** Higher volume capacity (\~10k emails/week); used for broader campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

### Community & Partnership Strategy

  - [**GrowthX Community:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [**Platform:** Circle](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [**Model:** $30/mo + waived $150 setup fee](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [**Content:** \~70% of value is recordings, live sessions, and courses.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Partnership:** Understory will create content for the community.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [**Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
          - ["Pre vs. Post GrowthX" SEO/GEO dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
          - [Tactical GTM engineering insights.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [**Goal:** Provide high-value content to attract and retain members.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
      - [Instruct Hesus to offer a free community month to the 60+ Lovable campaign repliers.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
      - [Draft copy for the new evergreen community campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
      - [Build the new Clay lead automation, replacing the current SIFT workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
      - [Scrape Profound/AirOps Luma lists by matching names to LinkedIn profiles.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [**Alex:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Begin creating content for the GrowthX community.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Explore a corporate benefits model for Clay Bootcamp with Nathan Lippey.](https://fathom.video/share/zV_UcKs6sz8w8ibjLWhs9wXspMRvB7-p?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
